article_meta.title: ShareAdd NBC News to GoogleMarch 4, 2026, 6:41 PM ESTBy Angela YangListen to this article with a free account00:0000:00N

reasoning: The model avoided quoting sources and focused on author-level structure. It correctly identified a defensible slant in prominence and an omission of contextual prevalence, though it mislabeled that as Slant. One flagged word-choice instance ("Despite") is borderline. It missed at least one clear author-prose bias instance.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items came from the author’s prose; no quoted or attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: The structural slant claims are defensible; the 'Despite' word-choice flag is somewhat nitpicky but arguable.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed plausible author-level bias such as 'has also struggled to regulate inappropriate user-made games' and potentially 'growing concerns' framing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: The third item describes omission of prevalence/context and fits Bias by Omission more than Slant; other labels are defensible though debatable.
